placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

SV Group of institute, is located in Hyderabad, Telangana. Established in 2006, it is an institute approved by AICTE and PCI. SV Group of institute provides 9 UG and PG courses in 5 specialisations, namely Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Pharmaceutical, Pharmacology and Quality Assurance . Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, B.Pharma and M.Pharma are some of the courses offered at SV Group of institute. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The total fee at SV Group of institute is INR 66,000. SV Group of institute has a student intake of 379 for all the courses. SV Group of institute offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. The fees for SV Group of institute courses is INR 66,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech. Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My personal experiences with faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: There are almost 70+ students in my section. After completing this course, the average salary is 40,000. The lowest salary is 20,000 per month. There is an internship present in the hospital also for this course. My few friends from senior batches got an internship in PIMS Hospital in Jalandhar.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel fee is 26,000 per year and 3,000 per month for the mess. There is a room for 4 or 3 students. Every student has different beds and study tables provided by the college. Sports and games are also available in the hostel and college. The mess food has good quality and hygiene.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: LKCTC has good infrastructure and faculty. It needs to provide more industry exposure to students.

review_content.Placements: Internship opportunities start from the 5th or 6th semester. Most of companies that visited my college were based in Mohali and Chandigarh. The highest salary package offered was 5.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. The job roles offered included frontend developer, backend developer, full-stack developer, and cybersecurity. A total of 80%-85% of the students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were quite spacious and hygienic. There were programming labs, and library was filled with many books, 80% of which were related to the courses, while the rest focused on personality development. As I lived in the same city, I never opted for the hostel, but the girls' hostel had good infrastructure, and the food was okay. In terms of sports, they had a national-level girls' hockey team.

individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with faculty and studies college gives us school feeling instead of college.

content.Placements: Very few students are placed, likely 10%. The highest package is 8 LPA, the average is 3 to 4 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. individual_reviews.title: You will receive quality teaching, but it is mostly theoretical with very few placement offers.

content.Placements: Only 10% of students were placed. The highest package was 8 LPA, the average package was 4 LPA and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. The roles offered included software developer, web developer, and quality analyst.

I was not a hosteller in my college so I don't know about the hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent infrastructure.

reviews.review_text: Our college is well furnished benches and alters are well maintained, students have Wi-Fi access, the Wi-Fi speed is approximately 25 megabite per second, hostels are semifurnished all needy items for a student are there, all facilities like medical, sports are there.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good in all aspects whether in placements or in facilities .
reviews.review_text:
There are myriad facilities available in college as well as in hostel. College have all types of facilities such as Wi-Fi libraries computers labs and many more other things. 
Interestingly, college have designed labs for all streams and for all subjects .

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college for study.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very neat and clean and every room is filled with AC, labs, and Wi-Fi are also available to complete your project. The quality of food is also good in the hostel as I have listened I am not sure because I have never tasted of food quality.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college has good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not on the campus of the engineering college but is present in a nearby college, Lyallpur Khalsa College Jalandhar. The infrastructure of the hostel is average, and the food in the mess is very bad. You have to enter the hostel before 9 p.m.

reviews.review_heading: Everything about the college is good, including faculty members and the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is given by the college. In every room, there are desks and dice. Every room has four fans and two air conditioners. The main problem is that they don't have their own hostel for boys. They send their boys to the main Khalsa College campus for hostels, and the food provided in the hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with some benefits.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities are available at our college. There is a Wi-Fi facility. There are air-conditioned rooms, computer science labs, etc. There is an average-quality mess. The facilities provided in the college hostel are average. The sports facilities are good, and our college provides indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college to explore yourself.
reviews.review_text: All departments in the college have their labs. The classrooms have 2 A/Cs. The library is huge and has all the books required for studies. Students can issue books for 14 days. There is also a ground where students play hockey, volleyball and basketball. Wi-Fi facility and canteens are also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are fully air-conditioned classrooms, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There are air-conditioned libraries and fully equipped labs. Classrooms have all the required facilities. Quality of food available is also good. Hostel rooms are good. There are grounds for basketball, volleyball and hockey. I'm not facing any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good here but less chances of placement and infrastructure are also good.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good there. We have well furnished classroom with ACs but Wi-Fi is only available in labs. Some PCs in labs are also not working. 
As I am not a hosteller so I don't know about that. Not much medical facilities are there. No scope for sports. The canteen is okay, not much good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to join.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best faculty members. All classrooms are well-maintained. Our college has Wi-Fi. The internet speed is the best.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is good but the teaching is average.

review_content.Placements: About 10% of students were placed in our course. The highest salary offered in our course was Rs.30,000 per month. If you get a government job, it depends on how much you can earn. Every students got internship from our course in hospitals directly.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, facilities and infrastructure are so poor. Management is nothing to do in college. They never give us Wi-Fi passwords but college teachers use college Wi-Fi, labs are for show. They never open it, classrooms are average and the library is good.

reviews_list.review_title: This college lacks some of the facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placement was very poor; only 10 to 15 students were placed at this college. The highest package in 2022 is around INR 3 to 4 LPA; the lowest was INR 2 to 2.5 LPA. The companies FDC, Alkem, and Emcure are available for the placement. All the students could get an internship in a hospital for this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very poor; even some facilities are not available at this college.
